recommendations.title: Daddio
recommendations.overview: A woman taking a cab ride from JFK airport engages in a conversation with the driver about the important relationships in their lives.

recommendations.title: Shuttle
recommendations.overview: When two friends return from a girls weekend vacation in Mexico, they find themselves stranded at the airport. Trying to get home safely, they board an airport shuttle for the short trip. But once their feet cross the threshold of the shuttle, a nigh

recommendations.title: The Uninvited Guest
recommendations.overview: Mysterious events lead an increasingly paranoid architect to believe a stranger is lurking in his large house.

recommendations.title: Airport
recommendations.overview: An airport manager tries to keep his terminals open during a snowstorm, while a suicide bomber plots to blow up a Boeing 707 airliner in flight.

recommendations.title: A Dog Named Palma
recommendations.overview: The film is inspired by an incredible story of a shepherd dog named Palm who was inadvertently left in the airport by her owner. She befriends nine-year old Nicholas whose mother dies leaving him with a father he barely knows - a pilot who finds the

recommendations.title: Bird People
recommendations.overview: An overstressed American businessman and a French chambermaid make a connection at an airport hotel in Paris.

recommendations.title: A Letter to Momo
recommendations.overview: A shy 11-year-old's life takes a strange turn when she discovers three hungry goblins living in the attic of her new house. She misses her old life. She misses her father so very much. Until she makes some new ghoulish friends.

recommendations.title: The Lake House

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.
